response.justification: Bogdan brings over a decade of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, Git) and demonstrable expertise in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS CDK), and end-to-end system ownership — including high-scale systems and testing practices — though his exposure to Nest.js and Vitest is inferred rather than explicit.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React with proven scale
Direct AI-agent infrastructure experience and open-source tooling contributions
Strong DevOps and testing culture (Docker, CI/CD, TDD, Vitest-equivalent frameworks)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
Limited evidence of recent work with Kotlin/Java or relational databases
German language proficiency is basic, may hinder local collaboration
